explicit_text: I was born and lived in Mexico City for 40 years. It’s a place full of pollution and traffic, which is something I wanted to leave behind for my family. Most of my work family was also born there, and although life was challenging, it shaped who I am. Leaving Mexico City was part of my journey to find a better life for my children.
implicit_text: I was born and lived in the capital of my home country for 40 years. It’s a place full of pollution and traffic, which is something I wanted to leave behind for my family. Most of my work family was also born there, and although life was challenging, it shaped who I am. Leaving that bustling metropolis was part of my journey to find a better life for my children.

explicit_text: Mexico is my home country, and despite its challenges like insecurity, a deficient education system, and low salaries, it has positively influenced me and my family. We are honest and hardworking people, and I carry that with me wherever I go. However, the harsh situation there pushed me to seek better opportunities abroad for my children’s future.

explicit_text: Anchorage, Alaska is where my life took a new turn after I became a widow. It’s been 15 months since we moved here, and adapting to the cold winters and language has been tough. This city is where I met my current husband through my uncle, and it’s where my family has grown closer despite missing our relatives back home. Living here has brought us closer to nature and away from the chaos of Mexico City.

explicit_text: Living in the United States has been a dream come true for me since childhood. My family and I visited the US for the first time as a family, exploring places like Disneyland, SeaWorld, and Legoland, and visiting cousins in San Diego and Los Angeles. Now that we live here, we appreciate the opportunities, security, and natural surroundings that the country offers. It’s a place where I can work hard and provide a better future for my children.

explicit_text: Our first family visit to the United States included a memorable trip to Disneyland. It was one of the best experiences we had together, filled with joy and excitement for my children. Visiting Disneyland along with other attractions made that trip very special and unforgettable for all of us.
